text:
The department may issue a cease and desist order if the department determines that the action is necessary to:

(1) prevent a violation of this chapter; and

(2) protect the public health and safety.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 643. Motor Carrier Registration
##### § 643.256 — Cease and Desist Order

The department may issue a cease and desist order if the department determines that the action is necessary to:

    (1) prevent a violation of this chapter; and

    (2) protect the public health and safety.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 919 (H.B.2985), Sec. 6, eff. September 1, 2009.*

subsections.text: The department may issue a cease and desist order if the department determines that the action is necessary to:
prevent a violation of this chapter; and
protect the public health and safety.
